sql_array: CREATE TABLE locations (id INT, latitude DECIMAL(9,6), longitude DECIMAL(9,6));
INSERT INTO locations (id, latitude, longitude) VALUES (1, 34.052235, -118.243683), (2, 40.712776, -74.005974);
SELECT id, haversine_deg_km(latitude, longitude, 34.052235, -118.243683) AS distance FROM locations;
UPDATE locations SET latitude = 41.878113 WHERE id = 2;
SELECT id, haversine_deg_km(latitude, longitude, 41.878113, -87.629799) AS distance FROM locations WHERE id = 1;
